title: 4 Pieces Stainless Steel Mixing Bowl Gold Salad Bowl 15 cm Large Stainless Steel Serving Bowls Gold Korean Bowls for Soup Rice Ramen Fruit Noodle (15 x 7 cm)
features: Packing list: You will receive 4 stainless steel salad bowls gold, measuring 15 x 7 cm, to meet your various daily needs

High-quality materials: The gold mixing bowls 15 cm are made of high-quality stainless steel, which is sturdy and impact-resistant. They feature a brushed and polished finish, are easy to clean, and resistant to rust

Large capacity: The stainless steel gold bowls are designed to meet your needs for different occasions and food quantities. Their deep and wide design allows them to hold more food, and they are stackable to save cabinet space
Easy to clean: The smooth surface of the korean bowl gold prevent grease and food residue from sticking, making them easy to wash by hand in the sink or in the dishwasher
Versatile uses: The gold salad bowls are ideal for use as storage bowls, fruit bowls, popcorn bowls, salad bowls, serving bowls, seasoning bowls, cookie bowls, and more
description: Product Description Package Includes 4 * Stainless steel gold bowl Specifications Product name: Stainless steel mixing bowl gold Quantity: 4 Pieces Material: Stainless steel Colour: Gold Size: 15 x 7 cm The gold bowl 15 cm has a deep bowl body, ensuring sufficient space for holding fruits and other foods, and providing a secure grip and comfort and stability during use. The stainless steel serving bowls gold features a double-layer structure design, offering excellent thermal insulation to prevent heat or cold from transferring to the outside of the bowl. Its compact size and classic, minimalist design make it suitable for both personal use and as a gift for friends. The korean soup bowl gold is versatile, ideal for whisking eggs, mixing ingredients, storing soup, salad, noodles, and more, making it suitable for various settings such as kitchens, hotels, and restaurants.
